title: verbena sessilis
intro: Verbena sessilis, also known as Dwarf Verbena, is a perennial plant belonging to the Verbena genus of flowering plants. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Verbena sessilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
